# usePreferredReducedMotion

Reactive prefers-reduced-motion media query.

**Package:** `@vueuse/core`
**Category:** Browser

## Usage

```ts
import { usePreferredReducedMotion } from '@vueuse/core'

const preferredMotion = usePreferredReducedMotion()
```
